name: Cheddar Chili Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Jalapeno pepper (seeded and finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Butter a 9-inch springform pan.
Mix breadcrumbs and 1/4 cup cheddar cheese. Sprinkle mixture into the pan, turning to coat. Refrigerate.
Dice about half of the ham; reserve the remaining slices.
Mix diced ham with the remaining ingredients in a blender or processor until smooth. Pour slightly more than half of the filling into the prepared pan.
Top with reserved ham slices in an even layer. Cover with the remaining filling.
Set pan on a baking sheet. Bake for 1 1/4 hours.
Turn off the oven and cool cheesecake about 1 hour with the door ajar. Transfer cheesecake to a rack. Remove sides of the pan. Cool to room temperature before serving.
